description: Fifty synthetic English customer reviews balanced across pain points, desired outcomes, objections, and emotional triggers. Every gold signal contains an exact source span.

reviews.text: Setup took three days before the team could begin.

expectedSignals.label: setup_complexity
expectedSignals.quoteText: Setup took three days

reviews.text: The service was painfully slow during our evening visit.

expectedSignals.label: slow_service
expectedSignals.quoteText: The service was painfully slow

reviews.text: Support never replied even after two follow-up messages.

expectedSignals.label: support_delay
expectedSignals.quoteText: Support never replied

reviews.text: It crashes every morning and interrupts our daily work.

expectedSignals.label: reliability
expectedSignals.quoteText: It crashes every morning

reviews.text: The instructions sent me in circles when I tried the first setup.

expectedSignals.label: unclear_documentation
expectedSignals.quoteText: The instructions sent me in circles

reviews.text: The final bill felt much too high for what was delivered.

expectedSignals.label: price_value
expectedSignals.quoteText: The final bill felt much too high

reviews.text: We waited almost an hour before anyone took our order.

expectedSignals.label: waiting_time
expectedSignals.quoteText: We waited almost an hour

reviews.text: The staff made us feel unwelcome despite the quiet room.

expectedSignals.label: staff_friendliness
expectedSignals.quoteText: The staff made us feel unwelcome

reviews.text: Delivery arrived four days late and the event had already passed.

expectedSignals.label: delivery_delay
expectedSignals.quoteText: Delivery arrived four days late

reviews.text: The dashboard is confusing to navigate for new team members.

expectedSignals.label: usability
expectedSignals.quoteText: The dashboard is confusing to navigate

reviews.text: Our saved settings disappeared twice after routine updates.

expectedSignals.label: data_reliability
expectedSignals.quoteText: Our saved settings disappeared twice

reviews.text: Booking by phone was impossible because the line kept dropping.

expectedSignals.label: booking_friction
expectedSignals.quoteText: Booking by phone was impossible

reviews.text: The room was not properly cleaned when we checked in.

expectedSignals.label: cleanliness
expectedSignals.quoteText: The room was not properly cleaned

reviews.text: I need setup to take minutes so a small team can start immediately.

expectedSignals.label: easy_setup
expectedSignals.quoteText: I need setup to take minutes

reviews.text: We want service that arrives on time without repeated status calls.

expectedSignals.label: dependable_service
expectedSignals.quoteText: We want service that arrives on time

reviews.text: I want support to answer the same day when a client project is blocked.

expectedSignals.label: quick_support
expectedSignals.quoteText: I want support to answer the same day

reviews.text: We need a tool that works every morning without an engineer watching it.

expectedSignals.label: reliable_tool
expectedSignals.quoteText: We need a tool that works every morning

reviews.text: I want instructions I can follow once and then work independently.

expectedSignals.label: clear_documentation
expectedSignals.quoteText: I want instructions I can follow once

reviews.text: We are looking for peace of mind during our busiest season.

expectedSignals.label: peace_of_mind
expectedSignals.quoteText: We are looking for peace of mind

reviews.text: I want a clear wait-time estimate before deciding whether to stay.

expectedSignals.label: wait_time_visibility
expectedSignals.quoteText: I want a clear wait-time estimate

reviews.text: We need consistent service at every branch for traveling team members.

expectedSignals.label: location_consistency
expectedSignals.quoteText: We need consistent service at every branch

reviews.text: I want pricing that is easy to understand before entering payment details.

expectedSignals.label: transparent_pricing
expectedSignals.quoteText: I want pricing that is easy to understand

reviews.text: We need our whole team to adopt it without weeks of training.

expectedSignals.label: team_adoption
expectedSignals.quoteText: We need our whole team to adopt it

reviews.text: I want a reply that solves the issue rather than another generic template.

expectedSignals.label: effective_support
expectedSignals.quoteText: I want a reply that solves the issue

reviews.text: We need delivery before the promised date for scheduled customer launches.

expectedSignals.label: on_time_delivery
expectedSignals.quoteText: We need delivery before the promised date

reviews.text: I want the first visit to feel welcoming from arrival through checkout.

expectedSignals.label: welcoming_experience
expectedSignals.quoteText: I want the first visit to feel welcoming

reviews.text: The annual price is hard to justify before we see measurable results.

expectedSignals.label: price_too_high
expectedSignals.quoteText: The annual price is hard to justify

reviews.text: I am not sure it fits our niche because our workflow is unusual.

expectedSignals.label: niche_fit
expectedSignals.quoteText: I am not sure it fits our niche

reviews.text: Moving all our records feels risky without a reversible import.

expectedSignals.label: migration_risk
expectedSignals.quoteText: Moving all our records feels risky

reviews.text: The learning curve may be too steep for colleagues with limited time.

expectedSignals.label: learning_curve
expectedSignals.quoteText: The learning curve may be too steep

reviews.text: A twelve-month contract feels restrictive while we are still evaluating.

expectedSignals.label: contract_commitment
expectedSignals.quoteText: A twelve-month contract feels restrictive

reviews.text: I worry about where customer data is stored and who can access it.

expectedSignals.label: data_security
expectedSignals.quoteText: I worry about where customer data is stored

reviews.text: There are too few recent reviews for me to trust the advertised results.

expectedSignals.label: social_proof
expectedSignals.quoteText: There are too few recent reviews

reviews.text: I cannot tell what the base plan includes compared with the upgrades.

expectedSignals.label: plan_clarity
expectedSignals.quoteText: I cannot tell what the base plan includes

reviews.text: It may not integrate with our current tools and duplicate work would be costly.

expectedSignals.label: integration_fit
expectedSignals.quoteText: It may not integrate with our current tools

reviews.text: I am unsure the small team can support us if our usage grows quickly.

expectedSignals.label: vendor_capacity
expectedSignals.quoteText: I am unsure the small team can support us

reviews.text: The cancellation process looks complicated which makes a trial feel risky.

expectedSignals.label: cancellation_friction
expectedSignals.quoteText: The cancellation process looks complicated

reviews.text: I need proof it works across locations before involving every branch.

expectedSignals.label: multi_location_proof
expectedSignals.quoteText: I need proof it works across locations

reviews.text: I felt completely frustrated after repeating the same setup four times.

expectedSignals.label: frustration
expectedSignals.quoteText: I felt completely frustrated

reviews.text: I was relieved when it finally worked without another support call.

expectedSignals.label: relief
expectedSignals.quoteText: I was relieved when it finally worked

reviews.text: I still feel doubtful because the result varies by location.

expectedSignals.label: doubt
expectedSignals.quoteText: I still feel doubtful

reviews.text: I feel confident recommending it after six reliable months.

expectedSignals.label: confidence
expectedSignals.quoteText: I feel confident recommending it

reviews.text: We left deeply disappointed after the promised fix never arrived.

expectedSignals.label: disappointment
expectedSignals.quoteText: We left deeply disappointed

reviews.text: I am hopeful the new process will help once every employee is trained.

expectedSignals.label: hope
expectedSignals.quoteText: I am hopeful the new process will help

reviews.text: The delays left me exhausted before the appointment even began.

expectedSignals.label: exhaustion
expectedSignals.quoteText: The delays left me exhausted

reviews.text: The clear explanation reassured me when I questioned the invoice.

expectedSignals.label: reassurance
expectedSignals.quoteText: The clear explanation reassured me

reviews.text: I felt ignored at the counter while staff spoke with each other.

expectedSignals.label: feeling_ignored
expectedSignals.quoteText: I felt ignored at the counter

reviews.text: The quick recovery restored my trust after an early mistake.

expectedSignals.label: restored_trust
expectedSignals.quoteText: The quick recovery restored my trust

reviews.text: I felt overwhelmed by all the options on the first configuration screen.

expectedSignals.label: overwhelm
expectedSignals.quoteText: I felt overwhelmed by all the options

reviews.text: The friendly welcome made me comfortable during an otherwise stressful day.

expectedSignals.label: comfort
expectedSignals.quoteText: The friendly welcome made me comfortable
